summary: Joel Spolsky announces his return to blogging and shares that his company Fog Creek Software has moved into a new office in a Manhattan townhouse. He highlights the office's garden and wireless networking setup for outdoor work.
key_points: Fog Creek Software relocated to a Manhattan townhouse office
The office features a garden for outdoor work
Wireless networking was set up to enable working outside in summer
money_quotes: we got wireless networking so we can work outside in the summer
key_insight: A brief update post announcing Fog Creek Software's move to a new Manhattan office with outdoor workspace.
